experiences.title: Hey! Cha
description: Architected and deployed a secure, multi-user POS ecosystem to digitize end-to-end business operations, including real-time inventory tracking, automated order workflows, and complex logistics.
Engineered a high-performance RESTful API using Spring Boot (Java 17) and a responsive UI with React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.
Implemented a robust security layer featuring OAuth 2.0, JWT, and Google Identity services, enforcing strict Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) across the platform.
Developed a dual-currency transaction engine (USD/NIO) to facilitate complex financial logic and real-time operational reporting.
Integrated AWS S3 for scalable cloud storage of digital assets and configured automated database backups to ensure data integrity and disaster recovery.
Optimized complex business logic for stock reconciliation and system validations, significantly increasing data consistency and operational efficiency.
Designed a real-time notification system to instantly alert on new transactions, status changes, and critical inventory levels.
